title: HYDRO CELL Stainless Steel Insulated Water Bottle with Straw - For Cold & Hot Drinks - Metal Vacuum Flask with Screw Cap and Modern Leakproof Sport Thermos for Kids & Adults (Fuchsia 24oz)
features: PERFORMANCE: Our Insulated Water Bottle is made from 100% Virgin Sourced 18/8 Food Grade Stainless Steel. 100% resistant to oxidation, rusting, and corrosion. 100% BPA Free. Cold 24 hours. Hot 8 hours.

DESIGN: Triple -Walled. Vacuum Insulated. Inner Copper Plating. Grip-Tech Powder Coating. Hydro Cell sets the standard for new colors/styles and ensures Thermos manufacturing excellence not found elsewhere. 64, 40, 32, 24, 18, 14 ounce sizes available.

STYLE: Purchase Includes Stainless Steel Bottle, Screw Cap (100% Airtight), Bonus Sports Cap with Straws (Cold Temp ONLY). Hydro Cell offers the largest selection of matching Paracord Handles, Bottle Boots, and Color Replacement Caps: Sold Separate, Linked Below. Customize your Hydro.
PROMISE: We are 100% Committed to Pure Base Materials & Production Excellence. If you are not 100% Satisfied, Contact Us Directly, and we will Refund/Exchange your Water Bottle. Customer First Brand.

PURPOSE: Your Purchase Supports Food & Water Projects all Over the World. Hydro Cell is a Mission Driven Brand that provides Environmental Conscience Products to Drive Change in Less Fortunate Areas of the World.
